description: Per-category token-depth overrides applied live on 'Set depth'. Category key = Revit category name (spaced, e.g. 'Mechanical Equipment'). Fields are optional and fall back to the Tokens & Depth panel globals when omitted: seqPad (2-5 SEQ zero-pad width), mask (8-char 0/1 over DISC LOC ZONE LVL SYS FUNC PROD SEQ), depth (1-10 paragraph/tier depth). Corporate baseline; override per project at <project>/_BIM_COORD/token_depth_overrides.json (merged by category key).
